svg.title: HLD framework — 5 phases from requirements to implementation
svg.desc: The five phases of High Level Design: requirement analysis, system architecture, module design, data and API schema, and technology choices, shown as a top-to-bottom flowchart with two swim lanes for functional and non-functional concerns.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What questions should I ask to gather functional requirements?')
g.text: Before designing anything, understand what and how well

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me examples of functional requirements for an e-commerce site')
sendPrompt('Give me examples of non-functional requirements for a frontend system')
sendPrompt('How do I prioritise features during an HLD interview?')
g.text: Pick 2-3 key modules to design deeply. Don't try to design everything.
Align on non-functional scope: which NFRs matter for THIS system?

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I justify technology choices in a system design interview?')
g.text: Framework, state mgmt, build tools, packages, design system — with reasons

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I draw a component hierarchy in an HLD interview?')
g.text: Routing, component hierarchy, data sharing strategy

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I design routing for an e-commerce frontend?')
sendPrompt('How do I decide component hierarchy in system design?')
sendPrompt('When should I use Context vs Redux vs React Query?')
sendPrompt('How do I design an API schema for HLD?')
g.text: Protocols, data models, API endpoints, pagination, debounce

g.onclick: sendPrompt('REST vs GraphQL vs SSE — when to use each?')
sendPrompt('What should I include in API schema during HLD?')
sendPrompt('How do I design data models for a product listing system?')
sendPrompt('Pagination vs infinite scroll — how do I decide?')
